notes: 25 programmatic-SEO briefs. Each produces one MDX file. Types: listicle | intent | guide. Slugs must be unique across content collections.

briefs.title: Best Ad Spy Tools for YouTube (2026): 7 Platforms Reviewed
briefs.targetKeyword: best ad spy tools for YouTube
briefs.angle: YouTube ad research — who actually indexes YouTube, who pretends to, and what the affiliate workflow looks like. AdRecon does NOT cover YouTube — lead with that, recommend PowerAdSpy or BigSpy for YouTube.

briefs.title: Best Ad Spy Tools for Native Ads (Taboola, Outbrain, RevContent) in 2026
briefs.targetKeyword: best ad spy tools for native ads
briefs.angle: Native ad research across Taboola/Outbrain/RevContent. PowerAdSpy wins this category. AdRecon is Meta-only. Be honest that AdRecon does not fit this use case.

briefs.targetKeyword: best ad spy tools for Google Ads
briefs.angle: Google Search + Display research. PowerAdSpy and BigSpy have coverage; AdRecon does not cover Google. Recommend accordingly.

briefs.title: Best Ad Spy Tools for Beginners: Easiest to Learn in 2026

briefs.angle: Ease of learning, UX quality, friendly pricing. BigSpy free tier + Foreplay UX are natural beginner picks. AdRecon is operator-focused, recommend as upgrade path once they outgrow free tier.

briefs.title: Best Ad Spy Tools Under $100/Month: 2026 Ranking
briefs.angle: Price-anchored ranking. BigSpy, Foreplay start under $100. AdRecon lifetime $299 breaks even in month 3 — lead with TCO math.

briefs.title: PiPiADS Alternatives: 6 Tools Compared for TikTok + Beyond (2026)

briefs.title: How to Choose an Ad Spy Tool: 2026 Buyer's Framework
briefs.description: A step-by-step framework for picking an ad spy tool: platform coverage, budget tier, use-case fit, and the 8 scoring dimensions that matter most.
briefs.angle: Frame decision around: (1) platform (Meta vs TikTok vs multi); (2) niche (affiliate vs DTC vs agency); (3) budget; (4) workflow depth. Show the 8-dim scoring rubric used on this site.

briefs.title: How Long Should an Ad Run to Be Considered a Winner?
briefs.description: A data-driven guide to interpreting days-running as a profitability signal: why 120+ days matters, what shorter windows mean, and how to avoid false positives.
briefs.angle: Explain the days-running profitability signal. AdRecon's Proven Creatives proof tiers (15+/30+/60+/90+) are concrete implementation. Educational — signal interpretation.

briefs.title: Meta Ad Library vs Paid Ad Spy Tools: When Free Is Enough
briefs.description: A brutally honest comparison: when Facebook's free Meta Ad Library is enough, and when you need a paid ad spy tool. With hard examples.
briefs.angle: Educational comparison. Honest: Meta Ad Library is free and powerful. Paid tools add (1) dead-ad archives, (2) affiliate-network classification, (3) landing page captures, (4) historical depth. Be honest about free-tier limits before pitching paid.

briefs.title: How to Find Winning Meta Creatives: A 2026 Research Workflow
briefs.description: Step-by-step workflow for finding and validating winning Meta (Facebook/Instagram) ad creatives — signals, filters, cross-advertiser grouping, and pitfalls.
briefs.angle: Workflow guide. Cover: days-running filter, cross-advertiser grouping (AdRecon Proven Creatives), landing page teardown, creative decomposition (hook/angle/CTA). Tool-agnostic framing.
